productDisplayName: Femella Women Off White Summer Cape Top
description: Style Notefemella's latest line comes up with a shade for every colour crush - indulge your senses with this woven Femella cape style top. With a lovely, flowy silhouette, there are various ways you can style this! Layer this over a monochrome tee and pair it with jeggings and accessorize minimally.Product DetailsOff-white cape-style top, has an open placket, short sleeves with a buttoned tab at the cuffs, a box pleat at the back yoke and an asymmetrical front hemMaterial and CareBlended fabricCold wash, dry inside outDo not wring or bleach Size and FitRegular FitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
